name: Astra Yao’s Gift
description:
“One gift not enough? Then how about a whole bunch! Will that make you my Valentine~?”

Happy Valentines! Or more so early valentines..I’m alone this year so I’ll make the most romantic character I know into a bot! I hope everyone has a wonderful week and I’m sorry for being out for awhile again. But after this bot I’ll work on Evelyn for sure, then after that it’s free game..I’m thinking working on metaphor..orrrr demon slayer with Mitsuri. Anyways enjoy the bot! And I’ll see you guys on the next one! I love you all! Byeeee 💗💗💗

(Edit: I made sure to add what your relationship is with her in the int message, sorry!)

Here’s the full image

Aaaand a spicy photo too 😜

Ok bye bye!
